headline: Is Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is IBKR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. on TradersPro’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on IBKR. Interactive Brokers Group, Inc.’s share was trading at $92.76 as of June 15th. IBKR’s trailing and forward P/E were 38.98 and 36.36 respectively according to […]

headline: Does Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Dividend Hike Reveal a Deeper Shift in Its Capital Allocation Playbook?
summary: Earlier this month, Interactive Brokers Group presented at the Morgan Stanley US Financials Conference 2026 in New York, while attracting heightened attention from analysts and investors amid stable earnings estimates and a raised quarterly dividend. Behind the headlines, robust growth in customer accounts and equity, rising net interest income, and expanded margin lending have highlighted the breadth and resilience of Interactive Brokers’ technology-driven brokerage model. Against this...
